dashboard.title: Forms Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Select a form or create a new one.

formDetail.title: Form Details
formDetail.noSubmission: Responses have not been submitted yet.

forms.title: Forms
forms.subtitle: {total} forms · {completed} completed
forms.emptyDesc: Create the first one to start.

deleteModal.title: Delete form?
deleteModal.desc: This will permanently delete the form for {clientName} and all its responses. This action cannot be undone.

intro.title: Tell us about your project.
intro.description: We want to deeply understand your project so we can create a visual identity that truly resonates with you and your audience.
intro.duration: ~{minutes} minutes · Can only be submitted once

common.title: Who are you?
common.desc: The foundation of everything. No filters, no pitch.

q_origin.label: Why does {clientName} exist? What was the original frustration or opportunity nobody was capturing?

q_ideal_client.label: Who is the exact client you MOST enjoy working with?
q_ideal_client.hint: Not the one who pays the most, but the one who makes your work worthwhile.

q_concrete_result.label: What is the most concrete, measurable result you deliver to a client?
q_concrete_result.hint: Not 'we improve processes', but 'we reduce onboarding time from 3 weeks to 4 days'.
q_concrete_result.placeholder: E.g.: Our clients reduce their time...

q_differentiator.label: Why did a client who got quotes from competitors end up choosing you?
q_differentiator.hint: Or what do returning clients say makes them stay?
q_differentiator.placeholder: E.g.: They tell us we are the only ones delivering on time...

q_previous_attempts.label: Have you tried to solve this problem before?
q_previous_attempts.hint: E.g.: Hired an agency, did it in-house. What failed?

q_internal_obstacle.label: Today, if you had a magic wand, what internal process would you eliminate?
q_internal_obstacle.hint: That process that drains your energy or time.

q_business_stage.label: Where is {clientName} at today?
q_business_stage.hint: This helps us understand the real starting point and adapt the strategy to your current situation.

options.starting: Just starting out — less than 1 year offering my services
options.established: Been around a while — I have clients but want to grow or improve
options.struggling: Been around but haven't seen the results I expected
options.relaunching: Relaunching — I had operations before and I'm starting over

branding.title: Brand personality.
branding.desc: Let's define how {clientName} looks, sounds, and feels.

q_perception_rank.label: Perception Ranking: What should be the first thing someone thinks when they see your brand?
q_perception_rank.hint: Rank from most to least important.

q_visual_inspiration.label: What brand (from any industry) has the visual identity you MOST like, and what makes it special?
q_visual_inspiration.hint: It doesn't have to be from your sector.
q_visual_inspiration.placeholder: E.g.: I like Notion because it's clean and unpretentious...

q_visual_avoid.label: Any brand or visual style you definitely DO NOT want to resemble?
q_visual_avoid.hint: Knowing what you don't want is just as valuable.

q_concrete_result_brand.label: Beyond the logo, what does this new identity have to achieve for you to consider it a successful investment?

q_tone_avoid.label: Is there any communication style that generates rejection as a consumer?
q_tone_avoid.hint: E.g.: 'Brands that talk to you like you're dumb'.

q_never.label: What kind of company, perception, or reputation would be a total failure for {clientName}?

q_accent_color.label: Is there a representative color that should be kept or explored?

web_current_site.label: Do you currently have an active website? If so, what frustrates you most about it today?
web_current_site.hint: URL if you have one. And be honest.

web_goal.label: If you could ask a visitor to the new site to do ONLY ONE THING, what would it be?
web_goal.hint: E.g.: 'Book a 15 min call', not 'sell more'.

web_type.label: What type of site do you need?

web_content_owner.label: Who will handle the content (texts, images, case studies)?
web_content_owner.hint: This is the #1 bottleneck in web projects.

web_features.label: What features does the site need?

web_deadline.label: Is there any date or event that forces the site to be ready by then?

seo.title: Organic visibility.
seo.desc: Let's define the strategy so {clientName} appears where it matters.

seo_current_site.label: Do you have an active website? Do you know how much real organic traffic you get per month?

seo_target_keywords.label: When your ideal client has the exact problem you solve, what phrase do they type in Google at 11 PM?
seo_target_keywords.placeholder: E.g.: 'how to automate small business billing'

seo_competitors.label: Top 2-3 competitors that currently appear where you should be.

seo_previous_attempts.label: Have you invested in SEO before? What happened?
seo_previous_attempts.hint: E.g.: 'We paid an agency for 6 months and nothing happened'.

seo_content_capacity.label: Do you have the capacity to generate articles/guides internally, or need someone to handle it 100%?

seo_geo.label: What geographic market do you want to reach?

seo_goal.label: What would be the point of ranking #1?
seo_goal.hint: More qualified leads, brand authority, etc.

ai-automations.title: Automate what slows you down.
ai-automations.desc: Let's identify what processes inside {clientName} can run themselves.

ai_current_tools.label: What tools does the team use today?

ai_pain_points.label: What task does your team do today that, if it disappeared tomorrow, no one would miss, but today they can't avoid doing?
ai_pain_points.placeholder: E.g.: transferring data from excel to a software.

ai_first_priority.label: If you could automate OUTRIGHT ONE THING this week, what would it be?

ai_processes.label: What are the main processes to consider?

ai_team_size.label: How many people are on the team that will use the automations?

ai_tech_level.label: From 1 to 10, how resistant is the current team to adopting new technologies?

ai_budget_range.label: Do you have a monthly budget in mind to pay for software licenses and automations?

crm.title: Your sales operation.
crm.desc: Let's understand how {clientName} manages its clients and sales today.

crm_current_crm.label: What do you use today to manage clients/sales?

crm_previous_attempt.label: Have you tried implementing a CRM before and people stopped using it? Why do you think it failed?

crm_pain_points.label: In what exact part of the current commercial process are leads stalling or time is being lost?

crm_pipeline.label: What is your sales process today (your pipeline)?

crm_team_size.label: How many sales reps/managers will use the CRM?

crm_integrations.label: A must-have, what does this CRM have to talk to?

crm_ai_features.label: Out of everything that can be done with AI and CRM, what 'superpower' would you give your salespeople?

contentOwner: We need Noctra to handle content
We have something but it needs work

alreadySubmitted.title: Form Submitted
alreadySubmitted.message: This Brand Discovery form has already been completed and submitted.

success.title: All Done!
success.message: We have received your responses successfully. We'll be in touch soon.

error.title: An error occurred
error.message: We couldn't submit your responses. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.

sent.title: Check your email.
sent.description: If {email} has an active account, you will receive the link in the next few minutes. Please check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: New Password.
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong password. You cannot reuse the previous password.

expired.title: Link expired.
expired.description: This link is no longer valid. Links expire after 1 hour.

common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this form? This action cannot be undone.
